channel.title: LKL on Anekoique's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in LKL on Anekoique's Blog

item.title: Basic Mechanism of LKL and UINTR
item.description: An introduction to Linux Kernel Library (LKL) and User Interrupts (UINTR) — how LKL runs the Linux kernel as a library for userspace applications, and how UINTR enables low-latency cross-process notifications without syscall overhead.
